name: BYLINE BANCORP, INC.
summary: PART I . General Byline Bancorp, Inc., headquartered in Chicago, Illinois, is a bank holding company. We conduct all our business activities through our subsidiary, Byline Bank, a full service commercial bank, and Byline Banks subsidiaries. The words "the Company," "we," "Byline," "our" and "us" refer to Byline Bancorp, Inc. and its consolidated subsidiaries, unless we indicate otherwise.
